title: Data Scientist
description:
Job Summary: In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next\-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high\-quality, real\-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters.

Key Responsibilities:

* Collect, clean, and preprocess diverse data sets to ensure integrity and readiness for analysis.
* Develop, validate, and implement statistical models to extract actionable insights from complex data.
* Conduct exploratory data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and opportunities for business improvement.
* Present findings and recommendations through compelling data visualizations and reports, tailored for technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Collaborate closely with team members to design and execute end\-to\-end data projects, from ideation to delivery.
* Continuously improve analytical methodologies and automation processes to enhance data workflows.
* Communicate effectively in both written and verbal formats, ensuring clarity and impact of data\-driven recommendations.

Required Skills and Qualifications:

* Expertise in statistics, mathematics, and data analysis techniques.
* Proven experience in collecting, handling, and cleaning large, complex data sets.
* Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, R, or similar for data manipulation and modeling.
* Strong data modeling skills with experience in building and validating predictive models.
* Advanced ability to visualize data using tools like Tableau, Power BI, or related libraries.
* Meticulous attention to detail and commitment to data quality at every stage.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity and precision.

Preferred Qualifications:

* Experience working in a remote, cross\-functional, or customer\-focused team environment.
* Background in developing and deploying machine learning solutions in production settings.

Interested candidates may send email to **maazwfh@gmail.com** and mention the position applied for in the subject line of the email.

We encourage you to share this opportunity with your family, friends, and professional contacts who may be interested in work\-from\-home positions.

For job updates and opportunities, candidates may also join our WhatsApp group:  
https://chat.whatsapp.com/EJN2n6PvGn93tuw2vgeyKk

If you are interested, please apply as soon as possible, as application links and opportunities may close without prior notice.

For any queries or applications, please email:  
**maazwfh@gmail.com**

Thank you.

Pay: ₹599,283\.84 \- ₹774,107\.10 per year

Work Location: Remote

title: Machine Learning Engineer ($175K – $250K + Equity) at CTGT, Inc.
QA Automation Lead - Insurance
description:
Tosca to Playwright C\# Migration \& Test Automation Strategy

**Experience Required: 12\-15 Years**

Job Summary

We are seeking an accomplished QA Lead to oversee the strategic migration of legacy Tosca automation scripts to modern Playwright C\# framework and drive the overall quality engineering vision. This senior role requires extensive expertise in test automation architecture, API testing, CI/CD optimization, and mobile testing strategies. The ideal candidate will provide technical leadership, mentor a team of QA engineers, manage US client relationships, and establish best practices across the testing organization. This role requires strong communication skills to work effectively across US time zones and influence stakeholders at all levels.

Key Responsibilities

* Lead the strategic migration from Tosca to Playwright C\# framework, defining architecture, approach, and best practices
* Manage and mentor a team of QA engineers, providing technical guidance, performance feedback, and career development
* Design and oversee comprehensive test automation strategy covering API, functional, performance, and mobile testing
* Build and optimize enterprise\-grade CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, ensuring scalability and reliability
* Lead mobile automation testing initiatives across device clouds and emulators, defining testing strategies
* Manage relationships with US\-based clients, providing strategic consultation, escalation resolution, and regular executive reporting
* Define and implement QA metrics, KPIs, and reporting dashboards to track testing effectiveness and ROI
* Establish quality standards, testing frameworks, and automation best practices across all projects
* Collaborate with delivery and development leadership to align testing strategies with business objectives
* Conduct technical interviews and recruitment for QA team members
* Stay current with emerging testing technologies, frameworks, and industry best practices

Required Qualifications

* 12\-15 years of comprehensive QA automation experience with proven team leadership
* Minimum 5\+ years in a QA leadership or senior technical role
* Demonstrated experience architecting and implementing large\-scale test automation frameworks
* Expert\-level proficiency in API testing design and implementation
* Deep expertise in CI/CD pipeline design, Azure DevOps, and test orchestration at scale
* Strong background in mobile automation strategy and device cloud management
* Advanced proficiency in C\# and object\-oriented programming principles
* Proven experience managing and mentoring technical teams
* Excellent stakeholder management and client\-facing communication skills
* Extensive experience with US\-based enterprise clients in complex engagements
* Ability to manage executive\-level discussions and present to C\-suite stakeholders
* Availability to work during US business hours overlap for meetings and leadership interactions (2:00 PM – 11:00 PM IST)

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience leading Tosca to Playwright migration projects
* Background with Guidewire or DuckCreek platform testing and strategy
* Expertise in performance testing and test data management strategies
* Certification in QA/QE leadership or quality management (ISTQB, ASQ)
* Experience with AI/ML in testing and intelligent test automation

Required Technical Skills

* Playwright C\# and test automation architecture
* C\# programming and SOLID principles
* Azure DevOps (enterprise\-level pipeline architecture and optimization)
* API testing frameworks and REST/SOAP architecture
* Mobile automation architecture (Appium, XCUITest, Espresso)
* Device cloud platforms (BrowserStack, Sauce Labs)
* Performance and load testing tools
* Git version control and branching strategies
* SQL and database testing

Work Arrangement

* Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India
* Work Mode: Hybrid
* Time Zone Coverage: 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM IST (US business hours overlap for leadership meetings, client interactions, and team synchronization

Pay: ₹1,000,000\.00 \- ₹2,100,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Work from home

Work Location: Remote
